name: funder-discovery-plugin
description: Discover, brief, score, and prioritize foundation prospects from public 990 data.

interface.shortDescription: Build ranked foundation prospect pipelines from 990 data.
interface.longDescription: Funder Discovery helps nonprofit fundraisers collect organization fit criteria, discover aligned foundations, generate one-page funder briefs, apply a transparent fit rubric, and export CRM-ready prospect pipelines using Kindora philanthropy data and ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer 990 records.
defaultPrompt: Build a ranked foundation prospect list.
Create a one-page brief for this foundation.
Turn these prospects into a CRM pipeline.
